dashboard.subtitle: Audit-ready progress for your CRC certification path.
dashboard.modulesHint: 15 modules from ethics through FDA inspections — versioned against your SOPs.
dashboard.examsHint: Pending quizzes and signature-gated certifications (e.g. IATA / DOT).
dashboard.certsHint: Records retained per policy; critical certs require verified identity.
dashboard.statDocsHint: Progress across all 52 ICH-GCP essential documents.
dashboard.shellNote: Content from Google AI Studio mounts here — this shell is your compliance-grade frame.
dashboard.integrationN8n: n8n can POST completion events to /api/webhooks/n8n
dashboard.integrationAudit: Supabase stores audit events (IP + User-Agent) via append_audit RPC

signature.title: Digital signature & identity attestation
signature.description: Required before issuing transport or regulatory-critical certificates. Your IP address and browser fingerprint are recorded for the audit trail.
signature.phraseTarget: I attest that I personally completed this training.
signature.checkboxTraining: I confirm I personally completed the training associated with this certificate.
signature.checkboxIdentity: I confirm the name above is my legal identity for compliance records.
signature.success: Signature recorded. Audit trail persisted in Supabase.

pages.modulesBody: Fifteen versioned modules (ethics → FDA inspections). Mount AI-generated lessons and SOP links here.
pages.documentsBody: Tracker for all 52 essential documents — wire to progreso_documentos_ich and documentos_esenciales.
pages.certificatesBody: Issuance history and downloads — connect to firmas_digitales and your PDF generator.
